messages.english: Indeed, with hardship comes ease.
Do not despair of the mercy of Allah.
So truly, with hardship comes ease.

messages.arabic: وَٱللَّهُ خَيْرٌ حَافِظًا ۖ وَهُوَ أَرْحَمُ ٱلرَّٰحِمِينَ
messages.english: Allah is the best of guardians, and He is the most merciful of the merciful.

messages.arabic: وَمَن يَتَوَكَّلْ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ فَهُوَ حَسْبُهُۥٓ
messages.english: And whoever places his trust in Allah, He is enough for him.
Call upon Me; I will respond to you.
Indeed, Allah is with those who are patient.
Remember Me, and I will remember you.
And He is with you wherever you may be.
Indeed, Allah loves those who place their trust in Him.

messages.arabic: لَا يُكَلِّفُ ٱللَّهُ نَفْسًا إِلَّا وُسْعَهَا
messages.english: Allah does not burden a soul beyond what it can bear.
Surely, in the remembrance of Allah do hearts find rest.

messages.arabic: إِنَّمَآ أَمْرُهُۥٓ إِذَآ أَرَادَ شَيْـًٔا أَن يَقُولَ لَهُۥ كُن فَيَكُونُ
messages.english: His command, when He intends a thing, is only to say to it: Be. And it is.
And give glad tidings to the patient.
Indeed, Allah is forgiving and merciful.
And Allah loves those who do good.
My success is only by Allah.
Allah is sufficient for us, and the best disposer of affairs.

messages.arabic: إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَىْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
messages.english: Indeed, Allah has power over all things.
We will surely test you with something of fear and hunger — and give glad tidings to the patient.
And to your Lord is the final return.
And He is the Forgiving, the Loving.

messages.arabic: ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَـٰتِ طُوبَىٰ لَهُمْ
messages.english: Those who believe and do righteous deeds — for them is blessedness.

messages.arabic: إِنَّ صَلَاتِى وَنُسُكِى وَمَحْيَاىَ وَمَمَاتِى لِلَّهِ رَبِّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ
messages.english: My prayer, my offering, my life, and my death are for Allah, Lord of the worlds.
And strive in the way of Allah with the striving due to Him.
And He is ever merciful to the believers.

messages.arabic: وَمَا ٱلْحَيَوٰةُ ٱلدُّنْيَآ إِلَّا مَتَـٰعُ ٱلْغُرُورِ
messages.english: The life of this world is but the enjoyment of delusion.
And establish prayer for My remembrance.
Do not lose heart, nor grieve.
And He is with you wherever you may be.
